summary: A hot, energetic show captured on a full‑rich matrix mix that highlights the standout Eyes > Foolish Heart jam and an excellent second set.
review: The performance is praised for its high energy, especially the Eyes > Foolish Heart sequence and a stellar second set. Reviewers note the matrix recording sounds full and balanced—better than a typical soundboard—though one mentions the mix can be a bit too hot for some ears.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently strong show comments (stellar second set, standout jam) and generally positive matrix recording feedback outweigh a few remarks about an overly hot mix.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Full, rich sound with audience level just right; many say it surpasses typical soundboard recordings. One reviewer notes the mix can be excessively sharp/hot.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Both sets are described as great, with particular emphasis on a stellar second set that keeps the momentum high.

band_member_comments.Keys: Post‑Brent jam praised, indicating strong keyboard contributions.
